name: Sayaji Shinde
quote: You don't want to give up your ministerial posts — then don't. But at least free Sonam Wangchuk from this hunger strike. You put so much heart into the Rancho of cinema, but why aren't you saying anything for the Rancho of real life? Sonam Wangchuk is very important for the country. My appeal stands, of course, but sensible people from every field should appeal to Sonam Wangchuk. The government must intervene immediately.
